product: Behavior changes for continuous jobs and pipelines
tagline: In early August 2026, continuous Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines and jobs will receive updates to simplify configuration and state management.
what_it_does: In early August 2026, continuous Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines and jobs will receive updates to simplify configuration and state management. Continuous pipelines You will be able to configure a continuous schedule directly from the pipeline page, including job level settings such as performance mode. Configuring a continuous schedule this way wraps the pipeline in a continuous job.
why_it_matters: Continuous pipelines You will be able to configure a continuous schedule directly from the pipeline page, including job level settings such as performance mode.
